PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAGLER, BENNIE CAGLER, ALTHEA SULLIVAN, MARION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, LORI LAPORTE, TIMOTHY $16,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,500.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFF BENNIE CAGLER $6000.00 AND PLAINTIFF ALTHEA CAGLER $10500.00. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS
